subcodes.first_line: The Supreme Pen hath made mention of the loved ones of God in the most eloquent language, and now, in sweeter Persian, doth proclaim [3.5s]... ...Say, O friends! The former lying caused the succeeding Beloved to be hanged and martyred by the bullet of opposition.
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی اولیای الهی را بلغت فصحی ذکر فرمود حال بلسان پارسی احلی میفرماید... بگو ای دوستان کذب قبل محبوب بعد را آویخت و برصاص ظلم شهید نمود تفکر در نفوس کاذبه
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @praise and encouragement, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @human reality created in the image of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @unity; oneness of humanity
